theme_description: B2B product catalog hub. An online, searchable product dictionary anchored on each product: model code, taxonomy, spec groups, hero image and rich content.

index.name: Product Hub home
index.description: Catalog overview: taxonomy facets + channel entries + featured products

description.label: Home intro
description.info: Rich text shown in the hero

channel.name: Product channel
channel.description: Product dictionary for one channel: banner + description + product grid

description.label: Channel description
description.info: Short blurb shown under the title

page.name: Product detail
page.description: Title + model + taxonomy + spec table + hero image + rich content

industries.label: Industries
industries.info: Choices come from the global taxonomy

scenarios.label: Scenarios
scenarios.info: Choices come from the global taxonomy

series.label: Series
series.info: Choices come from the global taxonomy

spec_groups.label: Spec groups
spec_groups.info: One row per line: `Group::Name::Value`. Rows are grouped by the first segment into spec tables.

description.label: Summary
description.info: One-liner used on cards and for SEO

downloads.label: Downloads
downloads.info: Format: `Name::Link` per line, supports multiple lines

doc_refs.label: Doc references
doc_refs.info: Format: `Name::Link` per line, supports multiple lines

faq_refs.label: FAQ references
faq_refs.info: Format: `Name::Link` per line, supports multiple lines

case_refs.label: Case references
case_refs.info: Format: `Name::Link` per line, supports multiple lines

related_products.label: Related products
related_products.info: Format: `Name::Link` per line, supports multiple lines

logo_url.label: Logo image
logo_url.info: Shown in the header; falls back to favicon + site name when empty

industries.label: Industries (one per line)
industries.info: Controlled vocabulary referenced by product pages via choices_from: $site.industries

scenarios.label: Scenarios (one per line)
scenarios.info: Controlled vocabulary referenced by product pages via choices_from: $site.scenarios

series.label: Series (one per line)
series.info: Controlled vocabulary referenced by product pages via choices_from: $site.series

cta_quote_url.label: Quote CTA link
cta_quote_url.info: Where the primary CTA points, e.g. /s/quote
